text: Entering this modern space, edged with glass and digital screens, I feel a curiosity rise—a philosophical tension between the sterile order of technology and the creative chaos of innovation. Seeing "R+D" boldly proclaimed stirs questions: in these curated environments, am I witnessing genuine development, or performances of progress? This bright, open setting invites contemplation, but feels slightly impersonal. I am curious, yet distanced—anticipating that here, reflection and invention might truly meet.
